signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.invitationMessage: You have received an invitation. Please sign in to accept it.
signIn.subtitle: Please enter your email and password to sign in.
signIn.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

signUp.title: Create account
signUp.invitationMessage: You have been invited to an organization. Create an account to accept the invitation.
signUp.subtitle: Please enter your details.
signUp.name: Name

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Please enter your email address to reset your password.

forgotPasswordEmailSent.title: Please check your email inbox.
forgotPasswordEmailSent.sentToPrefix: We have sent a confirmation email to
forgotPasswordEmailSent.sentToSuffix: . Please click the link in the email to reset your password.
forgotPasswordEmailSent.checkSpam: If you did not receive the email, please check your spam folder.
forgotPasswordEmailSent.resendIfNotReceived: If you have not received the email within a few minutes, please check your email address and try again.
forgotPasswordEmailSent.closeWindow: You can close this window now.

refreshEmailVerification.title: Resend confirmation link
refreshEmailVerification.description: Your email address has not been verified in time, so you cannot sign in. Please use the button below to receive a new link for your email address.

verifyEmail.title: Email verification required.
verifyEmail.messageSent: We have sent you a confirmation email to {email}. Please click the link in the email to complete your registration.
verifyEmail.checkSpam: If you did not receive the email, please check your spam folder.
verifyEmail.resendIfNotReceived: If you have not received the email within a few minutes, please check your email address and try again.
verifyEmail.closeWindow: You can close this window now.

welcome.title: Activate your account
welcome.subtitle: Welcome! Please set your password to activate your account.

company.name: Company name
company.taxNote: You can enter either a tax number or VAT ID.
company.vatLiable: This legal form is subject to VAT.
company.myCompanyVatLiable: My company is subject to VAT.

invoice.emailRequired: Email is required for email delivery

invoicesList.title: Saved invoices
invoicesList.searchPlaceholder: Search by customer, customer no. or invoice no...

deleteLast.modalText: This action cannot be undone. The last invoice will be permanently deleted.
deleteLast.modalWarning: Important: Only invoices you created yourself can be deleted.

sendEmail.invoiceMessage:
Dear Sir or Madam,

please find attached invoice {number}.

Best regards
sendEmail.reminderMessage:
Dear Sir or Madam,

we would like to remind you about the open invoice {number}.

Best regards
sendEmail.firstDunningMessage:
Dear Sir or Madam,

we have not yet received payment for invoice {number}. Please settle the outstanding amount immediately.

Best regards
sendEmail.secondDunningMessage:
Dear Sir or Madam,

we have still not received payment for invoice {number}. Please settle the outstanding amount immediately to avoid further action.

Best regards

pdfLoading.label: Creating PDF
pdfLoading.helper: Please wait, this may take a few seconds.

actions.deadlineToast: The deadline still runs for {days} days.

members.empty: There are currently no other members in your organization. You can <link>invite them here</link>.
members.changeRoleConfirm: Do you really want to change {name}'s role?
members.endMembershipConfirm: Are you sure you want to end {name}'s membership?

invitations.revokeDescription: Do you really want to revoke this invitation?

mailjet.title: MailJet Configuration
mailjet.description: You can create a free Mailjet account at <link>app.mailjet.com</link>
mailjet.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the MailJet configuration? All stored keys will be permanently removed.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.invoicePaid: has marked the invoice as paid
notifications.invoiceUnpaid: has marked the invoice as open

realtime.reminderEmailSent: {userName} has sent the {type} for invoice {number} by email

mainPage.description: You can either create a new company or wait for an invitation to join an existing organization.
mainPage.note: Note: If you create your own company, you will not be able to join another organization with this account later.
mainPage.enterCompanyData: Please enter your company data first to proceed with creating invoices.

emailSetting.disabled: Email sending is currently disabled. You can <link>enable it in the settings</link>.
emailSetting.postOnly: Invoices are permanently configured as postal delivery. This assignment is irrevocable at the time of creation to ensure the consistency of your records.

inviteWarning.title: Invitation available
inviteWarning.message:
You have already been sent an invitation to an organization.

If you create your own company now, you will not be able to join this organization later.

startLoading.title: Loading company data
startLoading.helper: Please wait, this may take a few seconds.

admin.title: Create new system admin
admin.description: The user will receive an email with a link to set their password.
admin.name: Full name
admin.createSuccess: Admin account created. Activation email sent!

usersList.name: Name
usersList.changeRoleConfirm: Do you really want to change {name}'s role?

sessionTimer.title: Session expiring
sessionTimer.description: You will be automatically logged out after this time:

apiErrors.companyNotFound: Company not found or no permission
apiErrors.lastInvoiceSent: The last invoice has already been sent and cannot be deleted.
apiErrors.lastInvoiceOtherUser: The last invoice was created by another user and cannot be deleted.
apiErrors.noOrganizationOrPermission: No organization found or no permission
apiErrors.alreadyInOrganization: User is already in the organization
apiErrors.invitationNotFound: Invitation not found or already processed
apiErrors.companySnapshotMissing: Company snapshot is missing for this invoice
apiErrors.companySnapshotNotFound: Company snapshot not found for this invoice
apiErrors.userAlreadyInOrg: User is already in an organization
apiErrors.bothKeysRequired: Both keys (Public and Private) must be updated together
